---
title: "Katherine Mary Wordsworth"
---

## Katherine Mary Wordsworth

**Dates:** (d.1897)

**Maiden name:** (Barter)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. William Barter

### Biography

She was the eldest daughter of the Rev. William Barter, Rector of Burghclere, and niece of the Rev. Robert Speckott Barter (1790-1861), Warden of Winchester College.  She married (28 October 1846), as his second wife, the Rev. Charles Wordsworth. She is not to be confused with her cousin Kate Barter, or the latter’s sister-in-law, Kitty (Moberly) Barter.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
